item.title: Global Animation Critic Rebel Taxi Praises PotenDogs
item.description: YouTuber and animation specialist Rebel Taxi (real name Pan-Pizza), who boasts over 500,000 subscribers, has drawn attention with his review of the Korean 3D animation PotenDogs.
item.dc:creator: dahllee
